text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I am once again in your debt, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you... for your kind words the other day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, my path is clear and my
confidence restored.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No longer am I blind to my own failings.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Besides, is there any race more fitting than this to
mark the Emperor's rebirth?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Today, a new name will join the legends who have
raced this track...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The name of Symboli Rudolf, the Emperor!
